wheelchair and/or scooter (Adm) - The data in this column indicates whether or not the patient used a wheelchair and/or scooter at the time of admission. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether or not the patient used a wheelchair and/or scooter at the time of admission. 0 = No
